basic_details.job_title: DRDO R&DE(E) Engineering Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Research and Development Establishment (Engrs.) (DRDO R&DE(E)) has officially announced the Engineering Intern Recruitment 2026 with 40 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website of DRDO. Candidates who meet the age criteria mentioned in the official notification and hold qualifications such as Pursuing Under-Graduation in Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or Pursuing Post-Graduation in Engineering Degree (2nd year) in the relevant discipline can now submit their online applications up to 27-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing Under-Graduation in Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or Pursuing Post-Graduation in Engineering Degree (2nd year), full time course in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/College/Institute
qualification.details: Pursuing Under-Graduation in Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or Pursuing Post-Graduation in Engineering Degree (2nd year), full time course in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/College/Institute.

selection_process: Merit basis Shortlisting based on academic track record (≥75% marks or ≥7.5 CGPA) Document verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DRDO R&DE(E) to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Engineering Intern position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Engineering Intern position at DRDO R&DE(E) is 27th May 2026. Ensure all details are submitted correctly before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be pursuing their Under-Graduation in Engineering (7th/8th semester) or Post-Graduation in Engineering (2nd year) from a recognized Indian University or Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend offered for the Engineering Intern role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000/- per month for the duration of their internship.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Engineering Intern positions?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit, with shortlisting done through academic track records (minimum 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA), followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the Engineering Intern positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: A total of 40 vacancies are available for the Engineering Intern positions across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q7. In which city is the Research and Development Establishment (Engrs.) located?
faq.answer: The Research and Development Establishment (Engrs.) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411015.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The start date for the internship is July 1, 2026. Specific duration details should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. For broader eligibility, please refer to the official notification PDF.

faq.question: Q10. How will shortlisted candidates be informed?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email by 15th June 2026. It is crucial to provide a valid email address in the application form.
